author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs
Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs

media:group.media:title: Blessings - Sunday, 28th June 2026 - #AllAreWelcome #EveryWednesday
media:group.media:description:
Blessings from Trinity United Reformed Church High Wycombe
- Join us for worship every Sunday #AllAreWelcome - Subscribe to receive notifications when we post new blessings and other items . - Like our blessings ❤️ or leave a comment sharing what they mean to you. 🙏 - Share this video with friends and family to spread the light of God's word. 🔄
Where to find us: https://goo.gl/maps/2TCLpBvVymaCcJeM6?coh=178571&entry=tt Website: https://www.trinity-urc.org.uk Podcasts: https://anchor.fm/trinitycoresend-1year-ago Twitter: https://twitter.com/trinity_urc Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/trinity_urc/ YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@TrinityHighWycombe What's on: https://www.eventbrite.co.uk/o/trinity-and-cores-end-united-reformed-churches-32072022553 Mastodon: https://mastodon.social/@trinityhighwycombe Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/trinityhighwycombe.bsky.social
#Blessings #Church #God #YoutubeShorts #Shorts #Relax #Mindfulness #TakeItEasy #BirdSounds #Garden #urc #UnitedReformedChurch #reels #TrinityChurch #KnowThatYouAreLoved #Jesus #BlessingsToYou #EveryWednesday #WednesdayInspiration
Need inspiration and encouragement to start your week off right? Let our blessing sink deep into your spirit and uplift you through the trials and victories ahead. 👂🔥
#TrinityHighWycombe #sunset #visitindia

author.name: Trinity High Wycombe and Cores End URCs
